1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: load 1km grid geometries (to be clipped by municipality)

3.description: find grid cells that intersect Kristiansand (one row per intersecting cell, may duplicate if many-to-many)

5.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

6.description: find grid cells (inside Kristiansand) that intersect the reduced storm-surge polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per grid cell id

8.description: count the distinct grid cell ids that intersect storm-surge in Kristiansand

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

SELECT id, objid AS grid_objid, ssbid1000m, shape_area, geom
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting the municipality bounding box (reduced grid)

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting the municipality bounding box (reduced storm-flo layer)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids that intersect storm-flood polygons

6.description: sort the aggregate result (deterministic) desc by count

7.description: limit final output to 1 row (the count)

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, omrade, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, objid, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["objid"]
-- metric_as: "count"
